did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a narrative review describing non-invasive skin imaging techniques (dermoscopy, high-frequency ultrasound, reflectance confocal microscopy, optical coherence tomography) for the diagnosis and monitoring of actinic keratosis. It discusses clinical applications, imaging features, and treatment monitoring but does not report the use of AI, machine learning, or deep learning algorithms to obtain study results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
